details: Phase 1 complete. Baseline: FFD=1622 bins, LB=1593, gap=29. Researchers: r1(initial_packing), r2(post_processing), w1(wildcard). Training: 10 instances, Validation: 6 instances.
Launched r1(initial_packing) and r2(post_processing) researchers in parallel
Merged r1/initial_packing to main. Total: 1622->1610 (-12 bins). Tagged composition-v1.
Final composition on main. Total: 1610 bins (-12 from baseline 1622). Gap to LB: 17. Improvements: med02(39), med03(97), med04(43), med05(114), lrg01(293), lrg02(339), lrg03(503). No regressions.
Final holdout: 1610 bins (baseline 1622, -12). Reports written. Experiment complete.
